name: Islamic Holding Group (Q.P.S.C)
summary: Islamic Holding Group (Q.P.S.C) invests in shares and bonds in Qatar. It operates through Brokerage and Real Estate segments. The company provides financial brokerage services. It provides property management, marketing, and sales services for real estate. The company was formerly known as Islamic Financial Securities Company (Q.S.C) and changed its name to Islamic Holding Group (Q.P.S.C) in July 2010. Islamic Holding Group (Q.P.S.C) was founded in 2003 and is based in Doha, Qatar.
